_meta.note: Feed phase timing is approximate and should be adjusted based on actual BW vs standard. Transition smoothly — never allow feed gaps.

feed_phases._description: Standard 3-phase broiler feed program. Some operations use 4-phase (add finisher 2).

phases.note: Critical phase — appetite development. Good crumble quality essential.
Rapid growth phase. Monitor FCR and BW vs standard weekly.
Focus on feed efficiency and meat yield. Withdrawal period required before slaughter per local regulation.

feed_withdrawal.note: Follow local regulations and processor specifications. Water must always remain available.

feed_consumption_reference._description: Approximate daily and cumulative feed consumption by age. Actual consumption varies with feed form, energy, temperature.

water_to_feed_ratio.note: Monitor water-to-feed ratio daily. Sudden drop = drinker blockage or illness. Sudden rise = diarrhea or high temperature.
